questions.question: What is the main security advantage of implementing a Content Security Policy (CSP)? (2-3 marks)
keyPoints: Shifts security model to a whitelist approach
Blocks malicious scripts even if injected into the page

questions.question: Describe the process of deploying a strong CSP policy for a legacy web application that relies heavily on inline JavaScript. (5-10 marks)
keyPoints: Start with `Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only` header to gather data
Use the `report-uri` directive to collect violation reports
Analyze reports to identify all required sources and inline scripts
Replace `'unsafe-inline'` by refactoring code to use external files
For necessary inline scripts, implement a nonce-based strategy
Generate a unique nonce per request and include it in the header and script tags
Switch to the enforcing `Content-Security-Policy` header once validated
Continuously monitor the report-uri for any violations indicating attacks
